results.name: bun run typecheck
results.summary: TypeScript compilation clean with no errors

executor_evidence: T06 alignment coverage added in three areas: (1) Helper-schema-to-skill-contract alignment — 11 tests verifying WorkflowStateSchema, LedgerEventSchema, VerificationRecordSchema include all canonical fields, narrow status enums match skill-contract required values, minimum lifecycle event types from skill contracts are accepted, diagnostics_status sub-fields are required, and evidence.md section validator covers all 5 required sections. (2) Pure helper verification — 3 tests confirming path helpers return strings without filesystem I/O, schema validators work on in-memory data, and helper module source has no fs imports. (3) Negative Phase 3/4 artifact exclusion — 6 tests verifying path helpers produce only Phase 2 paths and test fixtures contain no Phase 3/4 terms. Contract test alignment: 7 additional tests requiring skill docs reference machine-checkable canonical JSON keys, structured lifecycle sections, nullable reviewer_outcomes, verification_record_status provenance, record_status provenance, and no Phase 3/4 artifact directory paths. No changes to src/hooks/workflow-artifacts.ts — helper module was already fully aligned.

diagnostics_status.summary: TypeScript typecheck passed; no blocking diagnostics
